backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.87 - clearer status while SolidWorks is still launching (it is no longer mislabeled 'Wrong tenant' when the tenant is actually correct).

cadBridge.changelog: More reliable certificate install during CadBridge setup: the gateway CA is now downloaded with curl, which avoids a TLS handshake failure seen on some Windows PowerShell versions. Works on servers where port 80 is taken by another service.
